title: Opening for Medical Officer at RML Hospital Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at RML Hospital Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
